69bdfba39ea015fa709c681f description: Welcome to the RTT2 test! Please make note of any bugs and feedback. Turn in your first dollar to accept.
69cc8e901fda896ea59b50f0 description: Returning to Tarkov sure is nice. It would be good to scope out your entry point, briefly.
69cc8e901fda896ea59b50f0 successMessageT: It feels good to stretch your legs. They were beginning to atrophy.
69cc918b2e86c03e1e51974a description: One of the first things you'll need to do is to gather a few basic supplies to hold you over until you can find a more permanent source of provisions. Find some supplies and stash them.
69cc918b2e86c03e1e51974a successMessageT: What, no Oatmeal? You love Oatmeal!
69cc9aaa1c5ce40c22fa3a8a description: There's some old radar equipment on top of an old radar dome, not too far from here. If you can climb up top, perhaps you can place a smaller beacon on the larger beacon. What a clever idea, you think to yourself. Tarkov has a funny sense of humor.
69cc9aaa1c5ce40c22fa3a8a successMessageT: Success! We made contact with Chimera.
69cc9af11c5ce40c22fa3a8e: Mark the broken radar equipment in the dome on Reserve
